summary: Comprehensive testing of Three-Phase Feature Implementation for Construction OS Site Engineer. Phase 1 (Approved Materials with Brands), Phase 2 (Material Receiving & Stock Management), Phase 3 (Daily Progress Reports) - All backend APIs pass 100% (13/13 tests). Frontend UI features verified and working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data. Created test material requests with TEST_ prefix during API testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three-phase features fully implemented and verified. Phase 1: Approved materials endpoint returns branded materials list with search functionality in UI. Material requests support brand and is_approved_material fields. Phase 2: Enhanced receive dialog accepts date/time/lorry_image_id/material_image_id. Received-stock endpoint aggregates verified receipts. Stock tab has daily stock register. Phase 3: Daily progress POST/GET endpoints working. Progress tab shows entries with date, day, stage badge, summary. Today's Update dialog has project info, stage select, and summary field.

phase1_approved_materials_api.details: Returns list of approved materials with brand, unit, name fields

phase1_material_request_with_brand.details: Accepts brand and is_approved_material fields, saves correctly

phase1_ui_approved_materials_toggle.details: Dialog shows 'Approved Materials' and 'Custom / Other' toggle buttons

phase1_ui_materials_with_brands.details: Approved materials list shows brand badges (UltraTech, ACC, Tata Tiscon) with colored styling

phase1_ui_search_functionality.details: Search input filters materials by name or brand

phase2_receipt_enhanced_fields.details: Accepts receive_date, receive_time, lorry_image_id, material_image_id, GPS coordinates

phase2_received_stock_api.details: Returns aggregated received materials with receipts array containing date/time/images

phase2_ui_stock_tab.details: Stock tab visible with Daily Stock Register section, date picker, add material form

phase3_create_daily_progress.details: Creates progress entry with summary, current_stage, date, day, site_engineer_name

phase3_get_daily_progress.details: Returns list of progress entries sorted by date descending

phase3_ui_progress_tab.details: Progress tab visible with daily progress entries showing date, day, stage badge, summary

phase3_ui_todays_update_button.details: 'Today's Update' button opens Daily Progress Report dialog

phase3_ui_progress_dialog.details: Dialog shows Project name, Date, Day, Current Project Stage select, Work Summary textarea, Save Update button

screenshots_taken: 17_project_loaded.png - Project page with 4 tabs (Materials, Work Orders, Stock, Progress)
18_phase1_dialog.png - Material Request dialog with Approved Materials/Custom toggle
20_phase2_stock.png - Stock tab with Daily Stock Register
21_phase3_progress.png - Progress tab with daily entries list and Today's Update button
22_phase3_dialog.png - Daily Progress Report dialog with all required fields
